meta.name: oalders-playwright-net
meta.description: Playwright browser-download hosts: the cdn.playwright.dev entry point, its prss.microsoft.com / azureedge.net blob hosts, and storage.googleapis.com (cdn.playwright.dev 307-redirects the `chromium` = Chrome for Testing build to the chrome-for-testing-public GCS bucket). Split out of oalders-playwright so the Chromium-bundle filesystem grant can stay net-free.
